titleStmt.title: SII 10.134: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 134. (A.R. No. 552 of 1909.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE COURTYARD OF THE TEMPLE OF ANKĀLAMMA, KAREMPŪDI, PALNAD TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT. Ś. 1076. (Bhāva)

summary.p: Refers to the gift of 50 goats by Īśāna-Peggaḍa the minister of Kulōttuṅga-Chōḍa Goṅkarāja, for a perpetual lamp in the temple of Sūrēśvara of Kāremapūṇḍi built by him.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī sakava¨rṣamulu 1076 gu nēṁṭi bhāvasaṁvatsara mā¨rgaśira su
ddha 15 guruvāramuna samasta praśastisahitaṁbuna śrīmanma
hāmaṇḍalēśvara kulōttuṁggacōḍagoṁkarājula pradhāni tama
cca Īsanapeggaḍa kāremapūṁḍiniṁ dana yettiṁccina guḍi śrī
sūrēśvaradēvaraku sōmagrahaṇanimittamuna Akhaṇḍadīpa
munaku niccina mēṁkalu 50 vīni nindula sthānapatulu Īśāna
śaktiyu galyāṇaśaktiyuṁ jēkoni nitya māneṁḍu neyi
Ācaṁdrā¨rkkamugā naḍapaṁggalavāru . Ī mēṁkalaṁ gā
ceḍi bōyiniki nilurūka sāda mani yēmi yanyā
ya mani puṭṭiṁccirēni mahāpātakamu sēsina vāru
svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ [ṣaṣṭi¨rvva¨rṣasa]
hasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 10.134 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
